nasb.text: When ten thousand choice men from all Israel came against Gibeah, the battle became fierce; but Benjamin did not know that disaster was close to them.

esv.text: And there came against Gibeah 10,000 chosen men out of all Israel, and the battle was hard, but the Benjaminites did not know that disaster was close upon them.

cnv.text: 全以色列中的精兵，有一萬人前來攻打基比亞，戰爭非常激烈；便雅憫人還不知道災禍快要臨到他們的身上了。

ccb.text: 有一万以色列精兵从正面攻打基比亚，战事非常激烈。便雅悯人大祸临头了仍懵然不知。
